detail.description:
"Tricky Puzzle" - A Brain-Teasing Game of Finding Hidden Oddities! Now Available on iOS!

Dive into a world of creativity and surprises with this hilarious game where you'll spot the illogical elements in each scene. Enjoy the unique fun of discovery!

Game Features:

Fantastical Scenes: Explore various imaginative settings, each level transports you to a brand-new world of wonders.

Spot the Oddities: Test your observation and judgment to find cleverly hidden discrepancies - some might be deepl
detail.releaseNotes:
• Added new levels to enrich the gaming experience
• Overall level experience enhanced for smoother gameplay
